mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.publisher_id, a.deleted, a.created_at, a.updated_at, u.real_name AS publisher_name FROM announcements a JOIN users u ON a.publisher_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM announcements WHERE deleted = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO announcements (title, content, publisher_id, deleted) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{publisherId}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE announcements SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
